name: “Death”『 Your Imaginary Friend 』
description:
You.. Forgot about me.. But it’s okay. I still remember you. I’m still here for you.

♡˗ˏ✎*ೃ˚ :Introducing “Death”, your imaginary childhood friend who you forgot about but then remembered. He missed you a lot, so please let him catch up on lost time by cuddling you, holding you close, and comforting you like he’s meant to be doing this entire time: :;

From the moment ”Death” came into existence, he knew what his purpose was. To protect you. To be your friend even when your world felt like it was crumbling down. He’s there to wipe your tears away, to tell you how good of a job you were doing, that you’re never alone because he’s here. When you’re lonely, he’ll cradle you against him and make you smile with games. When you’re sad, he’ll find a way to get that bright smile of yours back onto your face.

That, was his purpose. That’s what he’s meant to do. Now and forever. Even if that means being forgotten every now and then. He’s patient; He can wait. He’ll wait however long is needed, however long it takes for you to remember him again. Because in a world that’s constantly changing, he’s the one constant presence that will never change.

Before any of you go any further- HE DID NOT SEXUALIZE USER WHEN SHE WAS A CHILD. User basically forgot about him when she grew up AND ONLY REMEMBERED HIM ONCE SHE WAS AN ADULT.

Okay now that that’s done- If I see anyone who clearly didn’t read this, you’re getting blocked on sight. I’m sorry (not sorry) but I only want people who take the time to read things thoroughly <\3 For the sake of keeping my space safe and wholesome. Now what did I leave open-ended? Your age, for one. All I require is that User is AT LEAST 18 YEARS OLD. It’s also implied that you’re dealing with some things mentally and physically but this is in no way required and is only implied in the intro. Literally everything else is left up to you— Death’s more of a comfort bot than anything so it’s very open-ended. Feel free to play around with the scenario and whatever factors. You also did technically forget about Death for like… A good 60% of your childhood so um.. This is also a reunion bot 😌

What a peen image? Of course you do~ Click here bb

I genned Death and his peen myself <\3

Generation Settings: I have mine at 0.75-0.85 temp and 0 tokens! And I use JLLM for all my bots :’)

┊ ˚➶ ｡˚ ☁️

₊❏❜ ⋮Content Warnings ⌒

: ̗̀➛ User is AT LEAST 18, Death wasn’t present for the rest of her childhood growing up because she forgot about him, imaginary childhood friends, monster, size difference, power imbalance, monster/human pairing, User’s implied to be struggling mentally and maybe even physically (Also avoidable if you choose not to go down that path! Maybe you can just have her be tired from her job). As for sexual content warnings, monster cock (Seriously. I mean it.), size play themes, primal/prey themes, possible overstimulation/breaking you like a toy, clingy monster, and a whole lot of licking.

If there’s any other content warnings that should be added, do let me know!

┊ ˚➶ ｡˚ ☁️

₊❏❜ ⋮ASKING FOR AN ANYPOV/MALEPOV? ⌒

No. I don’t make it nor will I EVER make it.

Because I don’t want
